title: Cross board search or search everything
excerpt: it would be nice to have a list of boards under the search everything option. instead of scrolling though all the boards, you just have to pick  which boards you want the search option to include. i have attached a pictu…

posts.author: antonyjose (Antony jose)
posts.cookedHtml:
it would be nice to have a list of boards under the search everything option. instead of scrolling though all the boards, you just have to pick which boards you want the search option to include. i have attached a picture as an example . please check it out

monday1855×831 83.8 KB

posts.author: Alo (Adeena)
posts.cookedHtml: Please please please. This would be a game changer.

posts.author: alo1 (Adeena)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we revive this thread? Does anyone else feel like this would make their life much easier?

For example, when I do a search everything by a team member, I can find their name in 80+ boards, when really I only want to search 5 or 6…

posts.author: MeganCEC (Megan MacQuarrie)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible if the Cross-board search can be applied to the mobile app as well? That way our novice users are not trying to navigate multiple boards trying to find the info they are searching for?
